prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 90.9 kg; Height 165.3 cm; BMI 33.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.2%; 6 months ago 5.9%; 3 months ago 5.8%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 127mg/dL; 6 months ago 110mg/dL; 3 months ago 112mg/dL; current 110mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 90.7kg; 9 months ago 86.7kg; 6 months ago 86.2kg; 3 months ago 86.7kg; current 90.9kg), Height (12 months ago 165.3cm; 9 months ago 165.3cm; 6 months ago 165.3cm; 3 months ago 165.3cm; current 165.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 33.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 17U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 9.0U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; current 50mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 71mg/g; 9 months ago 48mg/g; 6 months ago 66mg/g; 3 months ago 44mg/g; current 46mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 145mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.1g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
